title: pilosella glaucescens subsp. besseriana
intro: Pilosella glaucescens subsp. besseriana, also known as the Besser's yellow-scaled dandelion, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The medicinal properties of Pilosella glaucescens subsp. besseriana are said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used in herbal remedies for its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health.
